hypotheses.H1: ρ(λ_proxy, valley_depth) < 0 for conformal heads → sign anomaly in GPT-2
hypotheses.H2: Conformal heads have higher eff_rank in W_QK than non-conformal
hypotheses.H3: ρ(λ_proxy, eff_rank) < 0 AND ρ(eff_rank, valley) > 0 → mediation chain
hypotheses.H4: Conformal heads: GOE r-ratio ≈ 0.536; non-conformal: Poisson ≈ 0.386
hypotheses.H0: W_QK eigenvalues uncorrelated with attention geometry (null)

boundary_proxy.note: Proxy for BCFT boundary parameter λ: measures ratio of boundary-regime attention to bulk-regime attention at same Δx.

eigenvalue.r_ratio_def: Oganesyan-Huse r-ratio on sorted eigenvalue spacings

syk_predictions.note: SYK q=4 in D=1 predicts Δ=1/4; measured 0.2493 in exp-007

april17_sign_anomaly.note: ρ(λ_BCFT, valley) negative — BCFT 2D fit, Pythia/GPT-Neo on Modal A100
